languages.text: "Допустим, он действительно солгал. Расскажи свою версию ситуации".
"Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."
languages.original_text: "Допустим, он действительно солгал. Расскажи свою версию ситуации".

traits.locale_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."
"Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."
"Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

languages.text: 「仮に彼が嘘をついていたとしよう。あなたの言い分を聞かせてくれ」
languages.original_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

traits.locale_text: 「仮に彼が嘘をついていたとしましょう。あなたの言い分を聞かせてください。」

languages.text: «Supongamos que es cierto que miente. Cuénteme su versión de los hechos».
languages.original_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

traits.locale_text: «Supongamos que es cierto que miente. Cuénteme su versión de los hechos».

languages.text: “姑且算他撒谎了，讲讲你这边的说法吧。”
languages.original_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

traits.locale_text: “姑且算他撒谎了，讲讲你这边的说法吧。”

languages.text: "Nehmen wir an, er hat tatsächlich gelogen. Erzählt mir Eure Version."
languages.original_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

traits.locale_text: "Nehmen wir an, er hat tatsächlich gelogen. Erzählt mir Eure Version."

languages.text: "Diyelim ki gerçekten yalan söyledi. Hikâyeyi bir de senin ağzından dinleyelim."
languages.original_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

traits.locale_text: "Diyelim ki gerçekten yalan söyledi. Hikâyeyi bir de senin ağzından dinleyelim."

languages.text: « Admettons qu'il ait effectivement menti. Racontez-moi votre version des faits. »
languages.original_text: "Let's say he did, in fact, lie. Tell me your side of the story."

traits.locale_text: « Admettons qu'il ait effectivement menti. Racontez-moi votre version des faits. »
